headline: Why Is IQVIA (IQV) Stock Soaring Today
summary: Shares of clinical research company IQVIA (NYSE: IQV) jumped 5.8% in the afternoon session after Baird raised its price target on the stock to $249 from $230 and designated it a 'bullish Fresh Pick'.

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on IQVIA Holdings, Raises Price Target to $249
summary: Baird  analyst Eric Coldwell   maintains IQVIA Holdings (NYSE:IQV) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $230 to $249.
